creator: confidence.spotify.com

evidence.text: As our experimentation needs at Spotify have evolved, we've continuously evaluated what the market has to offer. Our choice has been to invest in building our own experimentation platform, because no tool has been able to meet our constantly changing requirements. Building your own platform is an incredible investment that's easy to underestimate. Part of the problem is that among commercial experimentation platforms, your choice has for a long time been build versus buy — with no viable alternative between the two. With Confidence, we're turning the build-vs-buy dichotomy into a build-and-buy continuum. Confidence is a modern, warehouse-native experimentation platform th

title: Experiment like Spotify: With Confidence
